name: Neptune Oyster
review: The lobster roll here is legendary for a reason. Get the hot buttered version. Worth the wait in line, but go on a weekday if you can.

name: Boston Public Garden
review: The Swan Boats in spring are a must. Beautiful in every season but especially gorgeous when the tulips bloom. Walk the bridge and just sit for a while.

name: Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum
review: The courtyard alone is worth the visit. A Venetian palazzo in the middle of Boston. The art heist story makes it even more fascinating.

name: Mike's Pastry
review: Iconic cannoli. Yes it's touristy, yes there's always a line.

name: Waitts Mount Park
address: Waitts Mt Park, Malden, MA 02148, USA
review: Best hidden gem to watch the sunset

name: ISF Trading
review: Best fresh uni and sashimi. They also deliver to Boston for $35 delivery fee

name: Sunny Girl
review: Hidden breakfast sandwich spot. This tiny place is filled with people in the morning

name: Bagelsaurus
review: Hands down best bagel in Boston
